title: YO25 9DR, GWE Biogas Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/TP3835KE/V011
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: GWE Biogas Ltd   Installation name: Sandhill Biogas Plant   Permit number: EPR/TP3835KE/V011   "
